questions.group_passage:
Many people think that living a green life in big cities is (8)______. They believe it is hard to protect the environment when you live in a busy city. However, our school proved that they were wrong.

Last month, we started a "Zero Waste" project. The goal was to reduce waste in our daily lives. First, we stopped using plastic bottles. (9)______, we brought reusable bottles to school. My classmate Tom even made a bag from his old T-shirts. It looked very cool!

Our teacher told us that small changes could make a big (10)______. She said that if everyone takes action, our city will become cleaner. The project has changed the way we think about rubbish. Now we know that most things can be reused or (11)______.

I am proud of what we have done. I believe that protecting the environment is not just the government's duty. It is everyone's (12)______. Let's work together to make the world a better place!

questions.explanation: 茫聙聬猫搂拢忙聻聬茫聙聭氓聣聧忙聳聡猫炉麓'氓聛聹忙颅垄盲陆驴莽聰篓氓隆聭忙聳聶莽聯露'茂录聦氓聬聨忙聳聡猫炉麓'氓赂娄氓聫炉茅聡聧氓陇聧盲陆驴莽聰篓莽職聞莽聯露氓颅聬'茂录聦忙聵炉忙聸驴盲禄拢茂录聦莽聰篓instead茂录聢莽聸赂氓聫聧茂录聦盲禄拢忙聸驴茂录聣茫聙聜茫聙聬茅聰聶氓聸聽氓聢聠忙聻聬茫聙聭A茅聙聣茅隆鹿however猫隆篓莽陇潞猫陆卢忙聤聵茂录聦盲陆聠氓聣聧氓聬聨忙聵炉忙聸驴盲禄拢猫聙聦茅聺聻氓炉鹿莽芦聥茂录聸C茅聙聣茅隆鹿therefore猫隆篓莽陇潞氓聸聽忙聻聹茂录聸D茅聙聣茅隆鹿besides猫隆篓莽陇潞茅聙聮猫驴聸茫聙聜茫聙聬忙聤聙氓路搂茫聙聭instead猫隆篓莽陇潞'莽聰篓芒聙娄芒聙娄盲禄拢忙聸驴芒聙娄芒聙娄'茂录聦氓赂赂盲陆聧盲潞聨氓聫楼茅娄聳忙聢聳氓聫楼忙聹芦茂录聦氓聣聧氓聬聨氓赂赂忙聵炉莽聸赂氓聫聧忙聢聳忙聸驴盲禄拢莽職聞氓聤篓盲陆聹茫聙聜

questions.label: -莽禄聠猫聤聜莽聬聠猫搂拢
questions.group_passage:
In many big cities around the world, architects are building something amazing called "vertical forests". These are tall buildings covered with trees and plants. The first vertical forest was built in Milan, Italy in 2014.

These special buildings look beautiful, but they do much more than that. They help clean the air by absorbing CO2 and producing oxygen. One vertical forest can absorb as much CO2 as 30,000 cars produce in a year. They also provide homes for birds and insects in the city.

However, building vertical forests is not easy. The "flying gardeners" have to climb up the buildings to take care of the plants. They check if the plants are healthy and water them regularly. This job requires special skills and courage.

Some people worry that these buildings are too expensive. But supporters say the benefits to the environment are worth the cost. They believe vertical forests are the future of city living.

questions.stem: What can we infer about the "flying gardeners" mentioned in Paragraph 3?
options: A. They are afraid of heights
B. They need special skills to do their job
C. They only work at night
D. They use helicopters to fly

questions.group_passage:
Being a student is not easy. You have to deal with homework, exams, and extracurricular activities. How can you manage your time well?

First, make a to-do list every morning. Write down all the tasks you need to complete. (17)______ This gives you a sense of achievement and helps you track your progress.

Second, find your most productive time. Some people work best in the morning, while others focus better at night. (18)______ Use this time to tackle your most difficult subjects.

Third, take regular breaks. Many students think they should study for long hours without stopping. (19)______ In fact, taking a five-minute break every hour can improve your concentration.

(20)______ If you spend all your time on one subject, you may neglect others. Try to allocate your time wisely among different subjects.

Good time management can help you achieve better results with less stress.

options: A. However, this is actually not efficient.
B. Therefore, you should identify when you feel most alert.
C. Finally, remember to balance different subjects.
D. Then, cross out each item when you complete it.
E. Without enough rest, your brain cannot work well.

questions.group_passage:
Being a student is not easy. You have to deal with homework, exams, and extracurricular activities. How can you manage your time well?

First, make a to-do list every morning. Write down all the tasks you need to complete. (17)______ This gives you a sense of achievement and helps you track your progress.

Second, find your most productive time. Some people work best in the morning, while others focus better at night. (18)______ Use this time to tackle your most difficult subjects.

Third, take regular breaks. Many students think they should study for long hours without stopping. (19)______ In fact, taking a five-minute break every hour can improve your concentration.

(20)______ If you spend all your time on one subject, you may neglect others. Try to allocate your time wisely among different subjects.

Good time management can help you achieve better results with less stress.

options: A. However, this is actually not efficient.
B. Therefore, you should identify when you feel most alert.
C. Finally, remember to balance different subjects.
D. Then, cross out each item when you complete it.
E. Without enough rest, your brain cannot work well.
